title: neottia reniformis
intro: Neottia reniformis, also known as the kidney-leaved lady's tresses, is a rare and endangered species of orchid native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Neottia reniformis include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential anti-cancer properties. Neottia reniformis can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
